metadata.description: QA and testing plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: test-plan-generator
plugins.description: Generate comprehensive test plans from requirements using formal test design techniques (EP, BVA, decision tables, state transition, use case testing). Use when user says 'test plan', 'test cases', 'write tests for this feature', 'QA this ticket', or asks to create test scenarios from requirements.

plugins.name: spec-compliance-verifier
plugins.description: Verify whether a NestJS/TypeScript code change correctly implements a Jira user story for a REST endpoint. Produces a deterministic JSON verdict (COMPLIANT / VIOLATED / UNDETERMINED) with counterexamples. Use when user says 'verify code against story', 'does this implement the ticket', 'spec compliance check', or pastes a story plus a diff.
